result.stdout:
A command line interface to investigate LEGO Powered UP hubs and devices.

Usage: poweredup [command] [options]

Options:
  -?|-h|--help  Show help information

Commands:
  device        Options to enumerate devices on a hub

Run 'poweredup [command] -?|-h|--help' for more information about a command.

commands.payload:
A command line interface to investigate LEGO Powered UP hubs and devices.

Usage: poweredup [command] [options]

Options:
  -?|-h|--help  Show help information

Commands:
  device        Options to enumerate devices on a hub

Run 'poweredup [command] -?|-h|--help' for more information about a command.

result.stdout:
Options to enumerate devices on a hub

Usage: poweredup device [command] [options]

Options:
  -?|-h|--help      Show help information

Commands:
  dump-static-port  Inspect a specific device on a Hub Port by using
                    (non-dynamic) information gathered using the LEGO Wireless
                    Protocol. Emits a binary dump (use list for human readable
                    output).
  list              Inspect all devices declared on the Hub by using information
                    gathered using the LEGO Wireless Protocol
  pretty-print      Pretty prints a previously recorded binary dump collected
                    using dump-static-ports

Run 'device [command] -?|-h|--help' for more information about a command.

result.stdout:
Inspect a specific device on a Hub Port by using (non-dynamic) information gathered using the LEGO Wireless Protocol. Emits a binary dump (use list for human readable output).

Usage: poweredup device dump-static-port [options]

Options:
  -?|-h|--help  Show help information
  --trace       Enable Tracing
  -p            Port to Dump
  -f            Add Hub and IOType Header

commands.payload:
Inspect a specific device on a Hub Port by using (non-dynamic) information gathered using the LEGO Wireless Protocol. Emits a binary dump (use list for human readable output).

Usage: poweredup device dump-static-port [options]

Options:
  -?|-h|--help  Show help information
  --trace       Enable Tracing
  -p            Port to Dump
  -f            Add Hub and IOType Header

result.stdout:
Inspect all devices declared on the Hub by using information gathered using the LEGO Wireless Protocol

Usage: poweredup device list [options]

Options:
  -?|-h|--help  Show help information
  --trace       Enable Tracing

result.stdout:
Pretty prints a previously recorded binary dump collected using dump-static-ports

Usage: poweredup device pretty-print [options]

Options:
  -?|-h|--help  Show help information
  --trace       Enable Tracing
  --t           System Type (parsable number)
  --h           Hub Id (decimal number)
  --p           Port Id (decimal number)
  --io          IO Type (hex number, e.g. 003C)
  --hw          Hardware Version
  --sw          Software Version
  --file        File to read from (otherwise stdin
